heading: Guaranteed obligations not eligible for purchase by Federal Financing Bank
label: 687k Guaranteed obligations not eligible for purchase by Federal Financing Bank
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to , prior to repeal by .section 318 of Pub. L. 85–699section 687j of this titlePub. L. 104–208

children.text: any obligation the payment of principal or interest on which has at any time been guaranteed in whole or in part under this subchapter,
any obligation which is an interest in any obligation described in paragraph (1), or
any obligation which is secured by, or substantially all of the value of which is attributable to, any obligation described in paragraph (1) or (2).
